'''zhakopo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:enantiomerization|enantiomerization]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-k-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:enantiomerization|enantiomerization]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| zhakopo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhækepeth|zhækepeth]] || [[word:zhækepej|zhækepej]] || [[word:zhækepesh|zhækepesh]] || [[word:zhækepe|zhækepe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhakokopoth|zhakokopoth]] || [[word:zhakokopoj|zhakokopoj]] || [[word:zhakokoposh|zhakokoposh]] || [[word:zhakokopo|zhakokopo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhakopoth|zhakopoth]] || [[word:zhakopoj|zhakopoj]] || [[word:zhakoposh|zhakoposh]] || [[word:zhakopo|zhakopo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhakofpoth|zhakofpoth]] || [[word:zhakofpoj|zhakofpoj]] || [[word:zhakofposh|zhakofposh]] || [[word:zhakofpof|zhakofpof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zhakopotho|zhakopotho]] || [[word:zhakopojo|zhakopojo]] || [[word:zhakoposho|zhakoposho]] || [[word:zhakopoko|zhakopoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zhakopoth|zhakopoth]] || [[word:zhakopoj|zhakopoj]] || [[word:zhakoposh|zhakoposh]] || [[word:zhakopo|zhakopo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zhakopothol|zhakopothol]] || [[word:zhakopojol|zhakopojol]] || [[word:zhakoposhol|zhakoposhol]] || [[word:zhakopokol|zhakopokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zhakopothotho|zhakopothotho]] || [[word:zhakopojojo|zhakopojojo]] || [[word:zhakoposhosho|zhakoposhosho]] || [[word:zhakopoko|zhakopoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zhakopothon|zhakopothon]] || [[word:zhakopojon|zhakopojon]] || [[word:zhakoposhon|zhakoposhon]] || [[word:zhakopokon|zhakopokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zhakopothoro|zhakopothoro]] || [[word:zhakopojoro|zhakopojoro]] || [[word:zhakoposhoro|zhakoposhoro]] || [[word:zhakopokoro|zhakopokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d414c41}}
